data.text: DISCOVERED BY ELHAM EPOC 6011.722.983.93X. IMPOSSIBLE TO LAND ON.
VERY CLOSE TO ONE OF ITS SUNS, MADE IT HARD TO SEE ANYTHING ELSE.
WORTH A VISIT, JUST TO SEE ITS TWO SUNS.
THE ONLY PLANET OF SUNS ONE-ZERO, IT APPEARS TO HAVE TWO MOONS.
TWO MOONS STILL NAMELESS, I'LL GIVE YOU THE HONOURS.
